We Actualize

Your

Empowering individuals and organizations to achieve transformative growth through cutting-edge technology, hands-on training, and industry-recognized certifications.

VISION

Join Our Graduates At Leading Organizations

Learn

Acquire sought-after digital and tech skills that are in high demand across industries.

Earn

Apply your newfound skills to create innovative business solutions and open doors to rewarding opportunities.

Connect

Join a vibrant community of tech and digital enthusiasts, ready to provide support and collaboration whenever you need it.

Thrive

Consistently surpass your goals and aspirations, fueled by continuous learning and the backing of a supportive community.

Explore Your Learning Options

Flexible Delivery Methods for Your Convenience

Embark on your learning journey with us and tailor your experience to suit your preferences and unique circumstances. Our programs offer divers delivery modes, ensuring that you have the flexibility to choose the learning style that best fits your needs.

Corporate

Ramp up your digital and tech team for business success. Our corporate training program offers the flexibility of customising our training schedules and location to fit your team.

Online Classes

Our online training program, which includes virtual and E-learning, offers the flexibility of studying completely online, on the go, at your own pace, and from the comfort of your home.

On-Campus

Undergo our digital marketing training program, and enjoy your journey towards success with like-minded course mates at our physical campus

About PDMA Technologies

Where we strive to bring vision to life - One business, one individual at a time

At PDMA Technologies, we believe that potential is boundless. As a global leader in transformative growth, we unlock the power of technology, mentorship, and continuous learning to help individuals and organizations reach new heights. Our mission is to fuel the growth journey of our students and partners, guiding them with cutting-edge technology and unwavering support.

  • Vision: “To be the global cause for transformative growth.”
  • Mission: “To unlock the boundless potential of individuals, organizations, and societies by fueling their growth journey with cutting-edge technology, nurtured talent, and unwavering support.”
Read More

Our Training Programs

Empowering Growth with Our Industry-Recognized Courses

Explore a variety of career-advancing courses designed to equip you with the skills needed to succeed in today’s fast-changing digital landscape. Whether you’re looking to become a Product Manager, Scrum Master, or Digital Marketing Specialist, PDMA Technologies offers tailored programs for professionals at all stages.

Why Choose PDMA Technologies

At PDMA Technologies, we go beyond traditional learning by offering a unique blend of hands-on experience, mentorship, and industry-focused certifications. Here’s what makes us different

Hands-On-Learning

All courses integrate real-world projects, so students can apply their skills to practical scenarios.

Internship and Job Opportunities

Have access to jobs and internships. Boost your team with top talents from our alumni pool.

Industry-Recognized Certifications

Gain qualifications that employers trust across industries.

PBE - Practical Business Experience

Field trip to businesses in various industries where you can learn and network already established and trusted business partners.

Post-Training Support

Benefit from mentorship and continuous support to guide your career growth even after completing your course.

Discover the PDMA Difference

Success Stories from Our Graduates

At PDMA Technologies, we pride ourselves on our graduates' success. Hear from some of the individuals who have transformed their careers with our training and post-training support.

What I learnt at PDMA not only landed me a job, but I rose to Manager ranks at Lagos Business School. I am glad I went to PDMA.
Toba OlugosiClient Relationship Manager, Lagos Business School
Thanks to PDMA, I was able to build my copywriting skills & was able to get a high paying job at a multinational Fintech - LEMFI
Precious AhamefulaCopywriter, LEMFI
The best thing PDMA did for me was beyond knowledge because i built a network of valuable professionals who have helped me to stand on my feet in just a matter of weeks.
Modupe JContent Creator
My business grew exponentially after applying the strategies I learned at PDMA.
Mrs BamideleCEO, NAILSCOPE
PDMA laid the foundation for my career in digital marketing. Today, I lead campaigns for multinational brands
Benjamin IkadeMarketing Strategist​
It was a remarkable time with PDMA, Learning with PDMA has been fantastic which i can recommend to anyone.
DavidPDMA

Our process - VISION

At PDMA, our meticulously crafted process is designed to empower you to extract the utmost value from our programs. We are committed to guiding you through each step of your transformative journey.

Implementation

We put all you've learned to the test. Work on group and individual projects that take you closer to your goal. At the end of your program and project assessments, you will be issued a globally recognised certificate from our U.S. partners.

Vision boarding

We try as much as possible to get a clear picture of where you are going and what you desire to achieve. Then we map out a way for you to get there.

Native

Become a clan member, you enjoy opportunities that comes from having a supportive community of passionate entrepreneurs and talents, a monthly webinars to keep up with updates on serval digital and tech, yearly events for networking and access to our business networks and partners.

In-depth Learning

We take you through courses and programs curated and taught by global experts to start you on your journey to actualising your vision. Your learning comes packed with assignments and assessments to speed up the learning process.

Strategy and ideation

Strategy and Ideation - Take part in strategy, creative, and ideation sessions designed to test your understanding and grasp of what you've learned. Put on your thinking hat, and create solutions for businesses.

Opportunities

During and after completing our program, we assist in getting you access to job and internship opportunities. We have a network of companies we partner with to make these opportunities readily available.
As a firm looking to boost your team through talent recruitment, we have a pool of rock-solid talents ready to contribute to your organisational goals.

Train Your Team

Look no further than our corporate training program. We offer flexible training options, including online, off-campus, and on-campus training.
Our curriculum is tailored to fit your organization’s specific needs, ensuring that your team receives the skills and knowledge they need to succeed. With our training program, you can expect to see improved team performance and a greater return on investment in your marketing efforts.

 

Don’t wait, let’s talk today and start building your dream team!

I am really happy because of the value i got from PDMA than what they charge, It has changed my Life and i would say, been part of PDMA is the Best that has ever happened to me.

My experience at PDMA positioned me to land a job right after my graduation where I manage social media accounts for both local & international brands

ARE YOU SEEKING TO RELOCATE BUT WANT TO LEARN A HIGH-IN-DEMAND SKILL TO INCREASE YOUR JOB OPTIONS BEFORE EMBARKING ON YOUR JOURNEY?

WE‘VE GOT YOU!

Owing to the digital disruption that has happened in the last few years {with the rise of the internet and social media}, lots of companies have had to adapt to meet up with current consumer demands, with a lot of commercial activities now taking place online. 

However, in order to meet this demand, stay competitive and remain relevant, they need personnel with digital and tech skills. This demand is ever-growing.

So it is your interest to learn transferable, in-demand skills you can use anywhere in the world. 

Relocational Testimonial

FAQ

What is PDMA Technologies Ltd.?

PDMA Technologies Ltd. is a pioneering tech and educational company that empowers individuals, startups, and businesses with innovative learning solutions, career development services, and industry-focused events. We provide comprehensive platforms such as Discovery by PDMA, PDMA Academy, and PDMA Hub, each designed to foster personal growth, innovation, and collaboration.

What services does PDMA Technologies provide?

PDMA Technologies offers a range of services that support individuals and businesses in their professional journeys. These include:

  • Discovery by PDMA: A platform for career exploration, networking, and personalized coaching.
  • PDMA Academy: A comprehensive training and mentorship hub offering online, hybrid, and in-person courses.
  • PDMA Hub: A collaborative platform for startups and entrepreneurs, offering pitch festivals, mentorship, and business growth opportunities.
  • Corporate Services: Tailored training and upskilling programs for companies of all sizes.
Who can benefit from PDMA Technologies' services?

Our services are designed for:

  • Individuals: From students and career switchers to experienced professionals seeking career advancement.
  • Startups and Entrepreneurs: Looking to grow their businesses, network with investors, or find mentorship.
  • Businesses and Corporations: Seeking to upskill their employees and drive innovation.
  • Government Agencies and NGOs: Interested in offering training programs to promote job readiness and workforce development.
What makes PDMA Technologies unique?

PDMA Technologies stands out for its:

  • Comprehensive Learning Ecosystem: Covering career development, education, and business growth under one roof.
  • Flexible Learning Formats: Offering self-paced, virtual, and in-person learning experiences.
  • Networking Opportunities: Access to industry leaders, investors, and experts at various events.
  • Focus on Innovation: Emphasizing emerging technologies and hands-on, project-based learning to ensure users are ready for the future.
How does Discovery by PDMA support career development?

Discovery by PDMA offers a variety of services to help individuals at different career stages, including one-on-one coaching, career exploration events, recruitment boards, and networking opportunities. We also host pitch festivals and specialized events where talents can connect with companies looking to hire top talent or invest in startup ideas.

What courses are available through PDMA Academy?

PDMA Academy offers courses in a wide range of fields, including:

  • Emerging Technologies: AI, data analytics, cybersecurity, and more.
  • Business and Marketing: Digital marketing, product management, project management, brand strategy, grant writing and more.
  • Creative Fields: Visual design, SEO, and brand design.
  • Soft Skills: Leadership, teamwork, and communication skills.

Courses are available in self-paced, tutor-led virtual, and in-person formats, making it easy for learners to choose the method that works best for them.

How can businesses partner with PDMA Technologies?

PDMA offers businesses opportunities for partnership through:

  • Customized Training Programs: Tailored courses that align with your business needs, focusing on areas like digital transformation, grant writing, data analytics, corporate communication, etc.,
  • Upskilling and Reskilling Employees: We provide flexible learning solutions that help businesses stay competitive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.
  • Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR): PDMA can collaborate with businesses to deliver impactful CSR initiatives through education and skills development programs.
What is PDMA Hub, and how can startups benefit from it?

Yes. Upon completion of the digital marketing training, you will receive a certificate. Additionally, PDMA will guide you on how to obtain certifications from Google, HubSpot, and other relevant international digital marketing certification bodies

Our training programs include: In-class training, Corporate training, and Online training

How do I participate in PDMA events or pitch festivals?

You can sign up for PDMA events and pitch festivals through our website. Visit the Discovery by PDMA or PDMA Hub sections to see upcoming events and register as a participant or attendee.

How does PDMA Academy support job placement?

PDMA Academy provides a range of career support services, including:

  • Internship Programs: Partnering with businesses to provide hands-on work experience.
  • Job Placement Services: Connecting graduates with job opportunities through our extensive network of industry partners.
  • Career Mentorship: Ongoing guidance from experienced professionals to help individuals navigate their career paths.
How can government agencies and NGOs collaborate with PDMA?

PDMA collaborates with government agencies and NGOs to develop training programs that promote job readiness and enhance industry competitiveness. We offer tailored courses, certifications, and mentorship programs to drive social and economic development.

What are the learning modes available at PDMA Academy?

PDMA Academy offers multiple learning modes to suit different preferences:

  • Self-paced Online Courses: Allowing learners to study at their own pace.
  • Tutor-Led Virtual Classes: Instructor-led classes in an interactive online format.
  • In-Person Learning: Traditional classroom sessions at our training centers.
  • Hybrid Learning: A combination of online and in-person sessions for a flexible learning experience.
What industries do PDMA Technologies cater to?

PDMA Technologies serves a diverse range of industries, including but not limited to:

  • Technology: Product management, Scrum, project management, cybersecurity, and data science.
  • Marketing, Fashion, Real Estate, etc: Digital marketing, grant writing, brand strategy, and corporate communication, social media management, etc
  • Creative Industries: Visual design, SEO, and web development.
  • Government and NGOs: Training and certification programs to enhance workforce skills and promote job readiness, industry competitiveness, digital literacy and technology adoption, social-impact initiatives, and local and international economical growth. 
How can I access past PDMA webinars and learning resources?

Recorded webinars and other digital learning resources are available through our website. You can purchase access to these recordings or gain access through premium membership plans, which provide exclusive content on various topics such as career development, technology, and business growth.

Does PDMA Technologies offer mentorship services?

Yes, PDMA offers comprehensive mentorship services through Discovery by PDMA and PDMA Academy. Our mentorship programs provide participants with guidance from experienced professionals in various fields, helping them make informed decisions about their careers and business ventures.

How do I get started with PDMA Technologies?

Simply visit our our academy page to explore our courses. You can sign up for courses at PDMA Academy, register for career development events through Discovery by PDMA, or find out more about our business growth services through PDMA Hub.

What certification do I receive after completing a PDMA Academy course?

After completing a course at PDMA Academy, you will receive a recognized certificate that verifies your new skills and qualifications. Many of our courses also include hands-on projects, portfolio building, and job placement support to ensure you’re ready for the next step in your career.

How does PDMA Technologies help with career transitions?

PDMA offers services specifically designed for individuals looking to switch careers, such as:

  • Career Exploration Events: Opportunities to discover new industries and roles.
  • One-on-One Coaching: Personalized guidance to help you navigate your career transition.
  • Training and Certification Programs: Courses that provide the skills you need to move into a new field.
How do I contact PDMA Technologies for support or inquiries?

You can contact us through our website at www.pdma.io or email us directly at info@pdma.io. Our team is available to assist you with any questions or provide further information about our services

Where is the best tech school in Lagos Nigeria?

PDMA has emerged to be seen as the go to tech school in Lagos. You can contact us through our website PDMA has become the go-to tech school for those seeking to launch or advance their careers in the Lagos tech scene. We offer a comprehensive range of programs designed to equip you with the skills and knowledge you need to succeed.

29, Ogundana St, Allen 101233, Ikeja, Lagos.
